full_text:
Liu Wangzhi 劉望之
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Wangzhi (劉望之)was born in Nanyang. Gave honest criticism that wasn’t received well, asked to go home. Liu Wangzhi was affiliated with Liu Biao.
